rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF OLGA I. CODY
rulings.Rulings: Irene Barrese's Demurrer to the "Third Ground" alleged in the First Amended Will Contest is sustained with 30 days leave to amend. The Motion to Strike is off calendar. Any party who wishes to argue the tentative ruling must notify opposing counsel and the court (415-551-3702) no later than 5:00 p.m. on Wednesday 10/5/11.
